form.formComment: Useful type. Comes off a 30 day let-up. Last outing finished third in a small field at Plumpton on March 9 over 5000m, 59 len behind Inferno Sacree carrying 75.5kg at $4. Start before finished fifth of 18 starters at Ascot on February 14 over 4700m, 13 len behind Walden with 70.5kg at $17. Hard to fault on current form.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last run favourite; won by 5 len Plumpton on March 16 over 5100m defeating Imperial Pride carrying 73kg at $1.90 in a steeplechase. Race before finished second in a small field at Plumpton on March 9 over 5000m, 1.3 len behind Inferno Sacree with 66.5kg at $3. Set to continue the fine recent form.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after two months finished third of 14 starters at Newbury on March 20 over 4900m, 1.75 len behind Kosasiempre with 68kg at $34. Previously second-up finished third of 14 starters at Wincanton on November 20 over 4000m, 2.25 len behind Our Dylan with 72.5kg at $7.50. Fitter and definitely worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made a bad mistake at the fourth last hurdle and never travelled thereafter.

form.formComment: Last outing finished fifth of 7 starters at this track on March 27 over 4300m, 16 len behind Motazzen carrying 76kg at $11. The run before finished fifth of 7 runners at this track on March 14 over 3800m, on slow going 31 len behind Dragons And Demons carrying 73kg at $12. Won't find this easy.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after 13 months finished second of 7 runners at this track on March 27 over 4300m, 10 len behind Motazzen with 67kg at $13. Previously second-up finished second of 10 starters at this track on January 26 2025 over 4360m, slow track; a neck behind Shuil Ceoil carrying 67kg at $15. Sure to make his presence felt.
